CheckStatusDetail
Backend unit tests● PASS198 passing (uv run pytest, re-run during this consolidated pass) — 78 of them are the new data layer: holdings 15 · money 18 · brokerage 10 · normalizers 26 · routing/credentials 9, all with mocked upstreams
POST /api/data/holdings — live smoke● PASSkind:ok · 10 rows · asOf 2026-07-17T15:59:40 · totals.current ₹2,43,208.97 · top BANKBARODA ₹1,23,646.80 (50.8%) — paise→rupees normalization verified against the FinX CSV values
POST /api/data/money — live smoke● PASSkind:ok · 72 merged txns (15 landed / 35 pending / 13 failed / 9 cancelled) · landed ₹1,620 in / ₹613.10 out · newest-first, Reason forwarded verbatim
POST /api/data/brokerage — live● PENDINGUpstream (api.choiceindia.com /middleware-go) answered AUTH_EXPIRED with the expired dev SSO — endpoint degrades correctly to kind:auth_expired; fresh-SSO live check still pending (needs a token minted <8h ago). Slab passthrough is unit-tested (10 tests) and the card path is verified below against the pinned contract
PII whitelist (per endpoint)● PASStest_only_whitelisted_fields_forwarded · test_destinations_are_masked (bank name + last-4 only) · test_pii_drop_list_never_leaves_the_backend (ClientName, full acct, Jiffy/Atom ids, Search_All_Levels asserted absent) · test_logs_carry_no_pii (holdings + money)
Two-layer error model● PASSHTTP-level and Status:"Fail" business failures both normalize to the pinned envelope (auth_expired / no_data / upstream_error); frontend branch on kind verified in the error-state scenario below

Notes

All three data cards are additive on the frozen engine — one descriptor file + one card component each, auto-discovered by the registries; the four file flows are untouched (P&L regression above).
  • Why browser-level stubs: the dev SSO JWT had expired (8-hour mint window), so /api/data/* was intercepted in the page with payloads shaped exactly to the pinned contracts and carrying the real numbers from the live smoke (holdings ₹2,43,208.97 / BANKBARODA 50.8%; money 72 txns, 15/35/13/9, landed ₹1,620 / ₹613.10). The backend endpoints themselves were exercised in the live smoke (holdings, money) and by the 198 unit tests.
  • Hero shows ₹2,43,209: by design the count-up reveal rounds to whole rupees (paise stay exact everywhere else — ₹613.10, ₹0.15 render paise-safe).
  • Pending: brokerage live-against-upstream needs a fresh SSO token (upstream currently answers AUTH_EXPIRED, which the endpoint maps correctly). Card + clustering are fully verified against the pinned contract; re-run the one-line smoke when a fresh token is available.
  • Not exercised: money partial/empty variants in THIS consolidated run (covered by the per-card wave verification + unit tests); real CSV file content beyond the download event + filename convention (generation is client-side and unit-shaped by the FinX column set).
Choice Jini · CHO-211 data-card flows · holdings + money + brokerage · consolidated E2E pass
